description: As an IT Data Governance Analyst, consolidate hardware manufacturer data following a recent merger by reassigning all models from 'Dell Inc.', 'Hewlett-Packard', and 'Lenovo Group' to their canonical manufacturers ('Dell', 'HP Inc.', and 'Lenovo' respectively) and removing the duplicate manufacturer entries. Register 'Cisco Systems' as a new manufacturer (URL: https://www.cisco.com, Support URL: https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/support/index.html, Support Phone: 1-800-553-2447, Support Email: tac@cisco.com) and add the 'Catalyst 9300' asset model under the 'Networking' category for this manufacturer. Ensure no existing assets are deleted or orphaned during this process.
